sample.title: Sample Digest
sample.subtitle: See what the daily InsightRadar PDF digest looks like. 16 pages of analytics from 20 media sources.
signals: [NEGATIVE] MISSILE TERROR — Russia launched one of the largest strikes of 2026: 703 targets, 18+ killed
[NEGATIVE] ENERGY CRISIS — IEA: Europe has 6 weeks of jet fuel. Brent: $98. ECB warns of stagflation
[NEUTRAL] NATO WITHOUT US — 'Plan B' gains momentum with Germany's support. Italy breaks defense deal with Israel
[POSITIVE] DRONE DIPLOMACY — Netherlands: €248M. Petraeus: Ukraine surpasses US in warfare concept
sample.fullVersion: Download the full digest (16 pages, PDF)

blog.title: Blog

about.title: About InsightRadar
about.subtitle: We build tools for understanding the global media landscape

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Make Western media analytics accessible to every Ukrainian decision-maker. We believe that understanding the external media environment is key to strategic planning.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: InsightRadar was created in 2025 in response to the need of Ukrainian analysts, diplomats, and business leaders for systematic Western media monitoring. The product is part of the NextMosaic ecosystem.

values.title: Our Values
values.accuracyDesc: We work only with verified sources and ensure analytics quality
values.speedDesc: PDF digest every morning by 08:00 — you start the day with the full picture
values.focusDesc: All analytics are filtered through the lens of Ukraine's interests
